phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah pah-rah kohm-PRAHR bee-YEH-tehs?

likely_response.local: Junto a la puerta principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la puerta principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where luggage storage is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la consigna de equipajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah kohn-SEE-gnah deh eh-kee-PAH-hehs?

likely_response.local: En el vestíbulo principal, junto a los baños.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LOHS BAH-nyohs
likely_response.translation_en: In the main lobby, next to the restrooms.

responses.english: In the main lobby, next to the restrooms.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LOHS BAH-nyohs
responses.local: En el vestíbulo principal, junto a los baños.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket machines are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar las máquinas de billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kon-TRAHR lahs MAH-kee-nahs deh bee-YEH-tes?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the main hall, next to the entrance.

responses.english: In the main hall, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reserve seats for Madrid train
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo asiento para el tren a Madrid?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh reh-SEHR-boh ah-see-EHN-toh PAH-rah EHL TREHN AH mahd-REED

likely_response.local: En taquilla 3, allí a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah ahl-LÍ AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At counter 3, over there on the right.

responses.english: At counter 3, over there on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah ahl-LÍ AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En taquilla 3, allí a la derecha.
